project: 三丽鸥梦幻消消乐 - 音效生成配置

sfx_tracks.elevenlabs_prompt: Cute pop sound, bubble burst, satisfying mobile game match sound, high pitch ding, magical sparkle, short and sweet, kawaii game effect
sfx_tracks.reference: 类似Candy Crush消除时的清脆声音

sfx_tracks.elevenlabs_prompt: Magical chime, ascending scale, sparkle sound, more satisfying than simple pop, fairy dust magic, mobile game power match, cute and impressive
Epic magical explosion, triumphant chime, rainbow sparkle sound, special achievement, combo celebration, spectacular game effect, cascading joy
sfx_tracks.reference: 类似获得大奖的华丽音效

sfx_tracks.elevenlabs_prompt: Power-up activation, electric spark, whoosh and zap, special ability ready, magical transformation, energy charge, super power sound
sfx_tracks.reference: 变身/特殊技能释放音效

sfx_tracks.elevenlabs_prompt: Cute button click, soft pop, UI selection sound, kawaii interface feedback, gentle tap, mobile game menu click
Victory fanfare, level complete celebration, triumphant music jingle, achievement unlocked, stars appearing sound, happy and rewarding, mobile game win
Soft defeat sound, gentle failure jingle, try again encouragement, not scary, cute game over, hopeful retry, uplifting failure
sfx_tracks.reference: 温和的失败提示，不打击玩家

sfx_tracks.elevenlabs_prompt: Star collection sound, sparkling chime, achievement ping, magical star appear, twinkle and shine, reward acquisition
sfx_tracks.reference: 获得星星时的闪亮音效

sfx_tracks.elevenlabs_prompt: Coin collection, gold pickup sound, treasure acquisition, satisfying money sound, ching ching, cute coins
Swap sound, whoosh slide, element exchange, smooth transition, quick movement, game piece slide
Invalid move sound, gentle error notification, soft buzz, not allowed action, cute rejection, try again hint
sfx_tracks.reference: 错误提示音，温和不刺耳

sfx_tracks.elevenlabs_prompt: Gentle drop sound, soft thud, candy falling, cute landing, game piece settle, light impact
Ice breaking sound, crystal shatter, frozen block cracking, magical ice melt, glass breaking but cute, frosty destruction
Chocolate melting sound, cocoa dissolve, sweet dessert destruction, gooey splash, yummy break
Dialogue box appear, cute popup sound, speech bubble notification, character talk start, friendly alert
